---
title: "Washington State Utility and Transportation Commission Solid Waste Rate
Setting Methodology Rate Model Review"
number: 4
image: /images/project6-wsutc.jpg
---
{{< include _return-to-pf.qmd >}}

::: {.article}
![](/images/project6-wsutc.jpg){.left-img}

Bell & Associates, in a joint venture with Sound Resource Economics, assisted the Washington State Utility and Transportation Commission (WUTC) with an examination into the validity of the Lurito-Gallagher (L-G) rate model and methodology for determining the revenue requirements for the solid waste collection companies regulated by the WUTC.  
The model is considered by many to be a black box because the regression formulas utilize data that is not clearly documented. The current model has been in use for over 25 years. The WUTC contracted our team to reexamine this statistical relationship to validate the current use of the L-G model, modify its use, or replace the model with a more appropriate methodology. The analysis of the rate model uncovered calculation errors within the L-G model that impacted returns. Our study recommended a change to a more transparent method for determining the revenue requirements for the State’s regulated waste haulers.
:::
